name: dealerpulse-elasticsearch-agents
description: Multi-Agent Dealer Operations Intelligence — command runner (not a Node.js project)
// README: This package.json is a COMMAND RUNNER, not a Node.js project. Run any command with: npm run <script-name>

scripts.env:create: conda create --prefix ~/runtime_data/python_venvs/hackathons/elastic_search_agents/dealerpulse-elastic-agents python=3.11 -y && echo '✓ Conda env created. Run: npm run env:activate'
scripts.env:remove: conda remove --prefix ~/runtime_data/python_venvs/hackathons/elastic_search_agents/dealerpulse-elastic-agents --all -y && echo '✓ Conda env removed'
scripts.env:info: conda info --envs | grep dealerpulse || echo 'Environment not found. Run: npm run env:create'
scripts.uv:install: conda run --prefix ~/runtime_data/python_venvs/hackathons/elastic_search_agents/dealerpulse-elastic-agents pip install uv && echo '✓ uv installed'
scripts.deps:install: conda run --prefix ~/runtime_data/python_venvs/hackathons/elastic_search_agents/dealerpulse-elastic-agents uv pip install -e '.[dev]' && echo '✓ All dependencies installed via uv'
scripts.deps:sync: conda run --prefix ~/runtime_data/python_venvs/hackathons/elastic_search_agents/dealerpulse-elastic-agents uv pip sync requirements.txt && echo '✓ Dependencies synced'
scripts.deps:add: echo 'Usage: conda run --prefix ~/runtime_data/python_venvs/hackathons/elastic_search_agents/dealerpulse-elastic-agents uv pip install <package>'
scripts.deps:freeze: conda run --prefix ~/runtime_data/python_venvs/hackathons/elastic_search_agents/dealerpulse-elastic-agents uv pip freeze > requirements-lock.txt && echo '✓ Locked to requirements-lock.txt'
scripts.setup:
npm run env:create && npm run uv:install && npm run deps:install && echo '
═══ SETUP COMPLETE ═══
Activate with: conda activate ~/runtime_data/python_venvs/hackathons/elastic_search_agents/dealerpulse-elastic-agents'
scripts.docker:vectors: cd DevOps/Local && ./docker-all-up.sh qdrant weaviate milvus chromadb
scripts.help:
echo '
═══ DealerPulse Command Runner ═══

FIRST TIME:
  npm run setup              Create env + install everything

DAILY USE:
  npm run docker:es          Start Elasticsearch + Kibana
  npm run data:load          Load synthetic dealer data
  npm run app:cli            Interactive agent CLI
  npm run app:api            Start web UI at :8000
  npm run app:scenario 3     Run scenario 3 (service diagnostic)

ENVIRONMENT:
  npm run env:activate       Shows conda activate command
  npm run env:info           Check if env exists
  npm run deps:install       Reinstall dependencies via uv

DEVOPS:
  npm run docker:up          Start all services
  npm run docker:status      Health check all services
  npm run docker:down        Stop (keep data)
  npm run docker:destroy     Nuclear reset
'
